# MuleSoft File Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.5) of File Connector documentation.
> See [File Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the File Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Using Anypoint Code Builder to Configure File Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/file-acb-configuration.md)
- [Copy and Move Files](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/file-copy-move.md)
- [Create a Directory Using File Connector Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/file-create-directory.md)
- [File Connector Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/file-documentation.md)
- [File Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/file-examples.md)
- [List Files Using the File Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/file-list.md)
- [To Trigger a Flow When a New File is Created or Modified](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/file-on-new-file.md)
- [Read a File Using the File Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/file-read.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure File Connector 1.5](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/file-studio-configuration.md)
- [Troubleshooting File Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/file-troubleshooting.md)
- [To Write a File Using the File Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/file-write.md)
- [File Connector XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/file-xml-maven.md)
- [File Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/file-connector/latest/index.md)
